zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cromwell於1364年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 奧 特倫特時，他的父親Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell26歲，母親Maud de Bernanke27歲。他和Lady Margaret至少有2個兒子。他去世於1461年3月21日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cromwell于1364年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 奧 特倫特时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell26岁，母亲Maud de Bernanke27岁。他和Lady Margaret至少有2个儿子。他去世于1461年3月21日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cromwell was born in 1364, in Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, was 26 and his mother, Maud de Bernanke, was 27. He had at least 2 sons with Lady Margaret. He died on 21 March 1461, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97.

fr.Carlton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Engla: Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cromwell est né en 1364, à Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maud de Bernanke, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Lady Margaret. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1461, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.Carlton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Engla: Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Cromwell 1364 in Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell 26 und seine Mutter Maud de Bernanke 27. Er hatte mit Lady Margaret mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 21. März 1461 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Lady Margaret. Morì il 21 marzo 1461, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cromwellが1364年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアカールトン オン トレントで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwellは26歳，母Maud de Bernankeは27歳であった。彼はLady Margaretとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1461年3月21日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cromwell(이)가 1364년 영국 노틴그함실르 칼턴  트렌트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Bernanke(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1461년 3월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.
